# MZI White Label Pro v3.0.2

## Highlights

This release focuses on WordPress.org submission readiness and Plugin Check compliance. GitHub source and the WordPress.org submission package now use the same plugin metadata, so there is no separate manual-only variant to maintain.

## Fixed

- Removed `Plugin URI` because it duplicated `Author URI`.
- Updated `readme.txt` contributor to `jemirokasih`.
- Updated `Tested up to` to `6.9`.
- Escaped dashboard widget fallback output.
- Improved request handling around admin tab selection, server info display, and compatibility checks.
- Removed direct `$_POST` field tracking from the settings sanitizer by moving posted field tracking into the registered option payload.

## WordPress Install Asset

Upload this release asset to WordPress.org or WordPress admin:

```text
mzi-white-label-pro-wporg-submit-v3.0.2.zip
```

The package is built from the same source used in the GitHub repository.
